Issue: Fix bug introduced by me on @benediktjohannes' PR#8708 where `using_cuda` was being ignored in `LabelStats.__call__()` when image and label tensors were on different devices
Decision: Fixed device synchronization bug in `LabelStats.__call__()` by properly calculating `using_cuda` and moving tensors to CUDA (when either is on CUDA) or CPU otherwise when devices don't match
Rationale: Replaced `# type: ignore` comments with proper `cast()` for type safety and preserved previous behavior of moving label to image device when neither tensor uses CUDA
Author: garciadias
